jd: Key Responsibilities:Designing and developing self-running AI software and predictive models.Creating scalable data pipelines and managing model deployment (MLOps).Writing robust algorithms using Python, C++, or R.Common Qualifications:Education: A degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related quantitative field.Frameworks: Strong proficiency in PyTorch, TensorFlow, or Scikit-Learn.Concepts: Deep understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP), Large Language Models (LLMs), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
